story.text:
# 🚪 Bakhta · Safety by Design (StarkWare 2026)
**gateway** · shared · knowledge

External convergence (high-assurance AI safety by design). Converges on the integrity gap (architectural infeasibility of independent verification · topological not procedural → C77), the specification-intent gap (→ C78), and multi-provider proof composition as the shared frontier (→ C79). Five-layer assurance stack.

## Edges out

- *references* → [[C77 · Integrity Gap ≡ Scales-vs-Hides]]
- *references* → [[C78 · Spec-Intent Gap ≡ Irreducible Promise]]
- *references* → [[C79 · Recursive Proof Composition (Shared Frontier)]]
- *references* → [[C80 · Bilateral Co-Signed Assumption Sets]]
